title: Set of 18 Plates with Lemon Decor
description:
A full dinner service for six people — 18 plates in total, with three sizes: dinner plates, soup plates, and side plates. Each piece is painted with our Praiano lemon pattern: clusters of bright yellow lemons with green leaves on a teal-green sponged background. The scalloped edges give every plate a soft, traditional shape.

The lemons are painted freehand and centred on each plate, sitting naturally among their leaves. The green background is applied with a sponging technique that gives it depth and movement rather than a flat colour. It's a warm, Mediterranean palette that makes food look good — and that matters when you're setting a table.

With 18 plates in the set, you have a complete service for six: six dinner plates for the main course, six soup plates with good depth for pasta or broth, and six smaller plates for bread, salad, or dessert. The plates stack well and are made for everyday use. The glazes are food-safe.

Every plate in this set is handmade and hand-painted by our artisans in Vietri sul Mare. Part of our Praiano Collection, it's named after our home town here on the coast. Individual plates are also available if you need to add to the set or replace one down the road.
excerpt: A full 18-plate dinner set with hand-painted lemons on green. Six each of dinner, soup, and side plates. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
seoTitle: 18-Plate Lemon Dinner Set — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade 18-plate dinner set with lemon decor on green, painted freehand by artisans in Vietri sul Mare. From Ceramiche Da Mario, Praiano.
